category.scope_note: Domestic and commercial furniture exported from China to the United Kingdom — fire safety, restricted substances, structural standards, and market access compliance comparison.

title.zh: 中国家具出口英国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家具出口英國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China furniture documentation against UK fire safety regulations, UK REACH substance restrictions, General Product Safety requirements, structural standards, and market access rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家具文件与英国防火安全条例、英国REACH物质限制、一般产品安全要求、结构标准及市场准入规则的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家具文件與英國防火安全條例、英國REACH物質限制、一般產品安全要求、結構標準及市場准入規則的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, fire safety assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and retailers should verify current UK law, fire safety test requirements, substance restrictions, timber regulations, and applicable standards with qualified professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、防火安全评估、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和零售商在出货或销售前应与合格专业人士核验现行英国法律、防火安全检测要求、物质限制、木材法规及适用标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、防火安全評估、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和零售商在出貨或銷售前應與合格專業人士核驗現行英國法律、防火安全檢測要求、物質限制、木材法規及適用標準。

answer_first.en: The Furniture and Furnishings (Fire Safety) Regulations 1988 are the biggest UK-specific gap — they require mandatory cigarette and match resistance testing to BS 5852 plus permanent labelling on all upholstered furniture, with no EU equivalent. Chinese GB 28481 certification does not satisfy these Regulations. Additional gaps include UK REACH substance restrictions, a UK Responsible Person requirement under the new GPSR regime, BS EN 12520/12521 structural standards, and UK Timber Regulations due diligence for wooden furniture.
answer_first.zh: 《1988年家具及装饰品（防火安全）条例》是最重要的英国特有合规差距——该条例要求所有包覆家具必须通过BS 5852烟头及火柴阻燃测试并加贴永久性标签，欧盟无对应法规，中国GB 28481认证不符合该条例要求。其他差距还包括：英国REACH物质限制、新GPSR制度下的英国责任人要求、BS EN 12520/12521结构标准，以及木质家具的英国木材法规尽职调查要求。
answer_first.zht: 《1988年家具及裝飾品（防火安全）條例》是最重要的英國特有合規差距——該條例要求所有包覆家具必須通過BS 5852煙頭及火柴阻燃測試並加貼永久性標籤，歐盟無對應法規，中國GB 28481認證不符合該條例要求。其他差距還包括：英國REACH物質限制、新GPSR制度下的英國責任人要求、BS EN 12520/12521結構標準，以及木質家具的英國木材法規盡職調查要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official UK legislation (legislation.gov.uk), standards bodies (BSI), government guidance (gov.uk), or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
